description: Strategic company-level templates for defining vision, codifying culture, planning organizational growth, and communicating progress to investors through structured, scannable visual boards

templates.name: Company Vision Board
templates.description: Strategic cascade board capturing company vision, mission, values, strategic pillars with key results, headline metrics, and milestone timeline

templates.name: Culture Canvas
templates.description: Cultural constitution board with behavioral values, anti-values, decision-making framework, communication norms, and team rituals

templates.name: Org Growth Plan
templates.description: Organizational scaling roadmap with timeline grid showing department growth, hiring priorities, cost projections, and team topology evolution

templates.name: Investor Update Board
templates.description: Structured investor communication dashboard with TL;DR, headline metrics, wins, challenges, product and team updates, financials, and specific asks
